data.title: ANZ Holds Profit Steady, Lifts Cash Earnings and Confirms Interim Dividend
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ANZ Group Holdings ( (AU:ANZ) ) has provided an announcement.

ANZ Group Holdings reported half-year statutory operating income of A$11.08 billion, down 1% from a year earlier, while statutory profit attributable to shareholders was steady at A$3.65 billion and cash profit rose 6% to A$3.78 billion, underscoring resilience in its core banking operations. The board declared a proposed interim dividend of 83 cents per share, 75% franked with New Zealand imputation credits, and confirmed that its Dividend Reinvestment Plan and Bonus Option Plan will operate for this payout, with shares to be sourced via on-market purchases for the DRP and new share issuance for the BOP, reinforcing capital flexibility and providing income stability for investors despite flat statutory earnings.

More about ANZ Group Holdings

ANZ Group Holdings Limited is a major Australasian banking and financial services group providing retail, commercial and institutional banking across Australia, New Zealand and other markets. The group offers lending, deposit, payments and wealth products, and targets both domestic customers and regional clients with a focus on disciplined balance sheet management and shareholder returns.

data.description:

An update from Vuzix ( (VUZI) ) is now available.

On April 29, 2026, Vuzix Corporation awarded 477,178 restricted stock units to chief executive officer Paul Travers and 193,258 restricted stock units to chief financial officer Grant Russell under its 2023 Equity Incentive Plan. Half of these awards vest on a time-based schedule between December 15, 2026, and December 15, 2028, while the remaining half, which can increase to as much as 75% of the aggregate initial grant, will vest based on performance achievements through December 31, 2028.

The structure of the grants ties a significant portion of executive compensation to both long-term service and operational milestones, reinforcing alignment between management incentives and shareholder interests. This compensation design underscores Vuzix’s emphasis on multi-year performance and may influence leadership focus on meeting strategic and financial targets through 2028.

The most recent analyst rating on (VUZI) stock is a Buy with a $6.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vuzix stock, see the VUZI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VUZI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VUZI is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (volatile revenue, persistent losses, and ongoing cash burn), partially offset by a low-leverage balance sheet and an earnings-call narrative showing improved cash burn and strategic progress in OEM/waveguide programs. Technicals are neutral-to-soft (below major moving averages), and valuation support is limited due to losses and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on VUZI stock, click here.

Vuzix Corporation operates in the technology sector, focusing on augmented reality and wearable display devices, including smart glasses and related optical technologies. An update from Prologis ( (PLD) ) is now available.

At its April 28, 2026 annual meeting, Prologis stockholders elected eleven directors, including Chair and CEO Hamid R. Moghadam, to serve until the next annual meeting, reaffirming the company’s existing board composition. Investors also approved, on an advisory basis, the company’s 2025 executive compensation program, indicating support for current pay practices and leadership incentives.

Stockholders further ratified the appointment of KPMG LLP as Prologis’ independent registered public accounting firm for 2026, maintaining continuity in external financial oversight. The combined outcomes signal broad shareholder backing for the company’s governance, compensation framework and audit arrangements, reinforcing management’s mandate and operational stability going into 2026.

data.title: Gran Tierra Sets Q1 2026 Results Date and Virtual-Only AGM
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Gran Tierra Energy ( (GTE) ) has provided an announcement.

Gran Tierra Energy said it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results after markets close on May 7, followed by a conference call for investors the next morning using a registration-based access system and webcast replay. The company will also hold its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders as a virtual-only event on May 8, underscoring its ongoing engagement with shareholders through digital channels across its multi-listed investor base.

Shareholders are encouraged to vote in advance and can attend, vote and submit questions electronically at the virtual meeting, while beneficial owners must coordinate credentials through their intermediaries. The combination of virtual governance arrangements and revised call access procedures reflects Gran Tierra’s continued effort to streamline investor communications and provide broader, more flexible access to its financial disclosures and corporate decision-making processes.

More about Gran Tierra Energy

Gran Tierra Energy Inc. is an independent international energy company focused on oil and natural gas exploration and production in Canada, Colombia and Ecuador. The firm is developing its existing asset portfolio in these countries, has an agreement with Azerbaijan’s state oil company SOCAR that may support future expansion there, and its shares trade on the NYSE American, TSX and LSE under the ticker GTE.

BFF Bank SpA ( (IT:BFF) ) has shared an update.

B.F. S.p.A. has published its Annual Financial Report as of 31 December 2025, making the document available to shareholders and the public in line with Italian financial market regulations. The package includes the draft separate and consolidated financial statements, the directors’ management report, the auditors’ reports, and the report on corporate governance and ownership structure for the 2025 financial year.

The disclosure, accessible at the company’s registered office, its website and an authorized storage mechanism, enhances transparency ahead of the ordinary and extraordinary shareholders’ meeting scheduled for 5 June 2026. By releasing full governance and audit documentation, BF underlines its compliance and provides stakeholders with a comprehensive view of its 2025 performance and governance framework, supporting informed decision-making by investors and other market participants.

data.title: Valneva Raises Up to €84 Million via Private Placement Tied to Lyme Vaccine Milestone
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Valneva ( (VALN) ) has issued an update.

On April 29, 2026, Valneva SE agreed a €37 million private placement of 15,893,817 new ordinary shares, each bundled with a warrant, at €2.33 per unit, with closing expected on May 5, 2026. If all attached warrants, exercisable at €2.96 until up to September 30, 2028 depending on U.S. FDA approval of its Lyme disease vaccine candidate, are exercised, the company could raise a further approximately €47 million.

The company plans to use the proceeds, together with existing cash, to advance its vaccine pipeline, support growth of its commercial vaccine franchise, and for general corporate purposes, signalling a bid to strengthen its balance sheet ahead of key regulatory milestones. Valneva also signed a registration rights agreement requiring it to register the new shares and warrant shares for resale within defined SEC timelines, with liquidated damages payable to investors if it misses filing or effectiveness deadlines, underscoring investor protections in the transaction.

The most recent analyst rating on (VALN) stock is a Sell with a $4.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Valneva stock, see the VALN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VALN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VALN is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large losses, negative free cash flow, and elevated leverage) and bearish technical momentum (price below major moving averages with negative MACD). The latest earnings call adds some support via liquidity/cash-burn improvement and pipeline catalysts, but guidance implies a 2026 revenue step-down and key upside (Lyme) remains timing-dependent. Valuation is difficult to assess with a negative P/E and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on VALN stock, click here.

More about Valneva

Valneva SE is a French specialty vaccine company that develops and commercializes prophylactic vaccines, with a pipeline that includes a 6‑valent OspA‑based Lyme disease vaccine candidate (LB6V, formerly VLA15). The group focuses on differentiated vaccines targeting infectious diseases and runs a cash‑generating commercial vaccines business alongside its R&D programs.

Average Trading Volume: 86,465

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $467.6M

data.title: Contact Energy names Jon Macdonald as new chair as Rob McDonald retires
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Contact Energy Limited ( (NZ:CEN) ).

Contact Energy Limited has announced that long-serving chair Rob McDonald will retire from the board at the company’s annual shareholder meeting later this year, after joining the board in 2015 and serving as chair since 2018. Under his leadership, Contact accelerated its renewable generation strategy, advanced major initiatives to support New Zealand’s energy transition and completed the acquisition of Manawa Energy.

Current director Jon Macdonald, an independent non-executive director since 2018, has been elected by the board to succeed McDonald as chair, effective at the close of the meeting. Macdonald, a former chief executive of Trade Me who also chairs Sharesies Group and sits on the boards of Mitre 10 New Zealand and Kiwibank, is expected to provide strong continuity of governance, supporting a smooth leadership transition and ongoing execution of Contact’s strategy.

More about Contact Energy Limited

Contact Energy Limited is a major New Zealand electricity generator and retailer, with a strategic focus on renewable energy and supporting the country’s transition to a lower-carbon energy system. The company has expanded its portfolio through initiatives such as the acquisition of Manawa Energy Limited, reinforcing its role as a key player in New Zealand’s energy market.

Average Trading Volume: 1,251,804

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: N$9.98B

data.title: Select Medical Declares Dividend Amid Mixed Quarterly Results
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Select Medical ( (SEM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Select Medical’s board-level compensation committee deferred by one year the vesting of several equity award tranches previously granted to Executive Chairman and Co-Founder Robert A. Ortenzio and Senior Executive Vice President Martin F. Jackson, contingent on their continued service. A day later, on April 29, 2026, the board declared a cash dividend of $0.0625 per share, payable on or about May 28, 2026 to shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026.

For the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, Select Medical posted 5.0% year-on-year revenue growth to $1.42 billion but reported lower income from operations, net income and adjusted EBITDA, with diluted EPS falling to $0.35 from $0.44. Segment results were mixed, with flat revenue and margin compression in critical illness recovery hospitals, strong double-digit revenue and EBITDA growth in rehabilitation hospitals and modest revenue growth but weaker margins in outpatient rehabilitation.

The company highlighted the March 2, 2026 merger agreement under which a buyer group led by Ortenzio and Jackson, alongside a fund affiliated with Welsh, Carson, Anderson & Stowe, plans to take Select Medical private at $16.50 per share in cash, subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals. The Hart-Scott-Rodino waiting period expired on April 27, 2026, and, if completed as expected in mid-2026, the deal would see Select Medical delisted from the NYSE and its shares deregistered, significantly reshaping the ownership structure for current investors.

Select Medical is maintaining its full-year 2026 outlook, projecting revenue between $5.6 billion and $5.8 billion, adjusted EBITDA of $520 million to $540 million and fully diluted EPS of $1.22 to $1.32. The reaffirmed guidance, alongside the announced dividend and ongoing go-private transaction, underscores management’s confidence in underlying operations despite near-term margin pressure and a transitioning capital markets profile for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (SEM) stock is a Hold with a $16.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Select Medical stock, see the SEM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SEM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SEM is a Neutral.

SEM scores as a mid-range opportunity primarily due to mixed financial performance—strong cash flow and improved leverage offset by sharp 2025 margin/EBIT compression. Technicals are supportive but near overbought, valuation is reasonable, and the latest call/guidance is constructive but weighed down by outpatient profit weakness and a guidance shortfall. The go-private deal is a notable positive catalyst that supports the overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on SEM stock, click here.

More about Select Medical

Select Medical Holdings Corporation is a U.S. healthcare services provider and one of the country’s largest operators of critical illness recovery hospitals, rehabilitation hospitals and outpatient rehabilitation clinics. As of March 31, 2026, it ran 103 critical illness recovery hospitals in 28 states, 41 rehabilitation hospitals in 15 states and 1,912 outpatient rehab clinics across 37 states and Washington, D.C.

The company reports through three segments: critical illness recovery hospitals, rehabilitation hospitals and outpatient rehabilitation, giving it broad exposure to post-acute and rehabilitative care demand nationwide. Its common stock trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker SEM.

Average Trading Volume: 2,206,504

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.05B

Find detailed analytics on SEM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
